# Customers — MEOK AI Labs | 6 Case Studies

> 6 case studies from MEOK AI Labs customers across fintech, healthtech, HR-tech, care-homes, govtech, retail. 4-day signed Article 50 attestation, £4,950 vs Big-4 £40-80K. Sovereign UK.

## Overview
Customers — MEOK AI Labs | 6 Case Studies is part of the MEOK AI Labs sovereign compliance and attestation platform.
